title: KonoQOL
description: A collection of mods that are compatible with vanilla client and server to improve performance and add a few QOL features.
body:
# KonoQOL
This pack contains many mods that will not have a large impact on gameplay, and will still allow you to join vanilla servers or have vanilla clients join your server, but will increase performance and add a few quality of life features. This is mostly intended to be the mods my friends and I will use but anyone is welcome to use it.

## Mod list
- 3D Skin Layers
- Animatica
- AntiGhost
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- Auth Me
- Axolotl Buckets
- Better Beds
- Better Mount HUD
- Borderless Mining
- CIT Resewn
- Clear Skies
- Cloth Config API
- Continuity
- Cull Less Leaves
- Custom LAN
- DashLoader
- Don't Clear Chat History
- Dynamic FPS
- Ears (+ Snouts/Muzzles, Tails, Horns, Wings, and More)
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Texture Features
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Fabric Tailor
- Fabrishot
- FerriteCore
- Indium
- Inv View
- Iris Shaders
- Krypton
- LazyDFU
- Lithium
- Logical Zoom
- Memory Leak Fix
- Mod Menu
- MoreChatHistory
- MoreCreativeTabs
- Mouse Wheelie *[Lightly preconfigured]*
- No Chat Reports *[MC Versions 1.19+]*
- No Telemetry *[MC Versions before 1.19]*
- OptiGUI
- Raised
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Starlight
- TabTPS
- Textile Backup
- ToolTipFix
